title: You can still run with the stock market's bulls, but watch the exits
text: The stock market, as measured by the S&P 500 Index SPX, -0.64% ), has been moving upward. The U.S. benchmark index is essentially crawling up the higher “modified Bollinger Bands” (mBB), which is a bit of an overbought condition, but not a sell signal.

title: Viatris Stock: Bull vs. Bear
text: Investors like Viatris for its dividend and low valuation. Still, Viatris sales right now are on the decline.

title: 1 Reason I Wouldn't Buy This High-Yielding Dividend Stock
text: Viatris offers investors a high dividend yield of 4.7%. The company's underlying business, however, has struggled to generate growth.

title: Better Pharma Buy: Viatris vs. Pfizer
text: Viatris has filled its pipeline with promising products -- that could add billions to revenue. Pfizer aims to launch a record number of drugs over the coming year or so.

title: Viatris: Developing Into A Fantastic Investment Opportunity
text: Viatris Inc. has a low valuation with a forward P/E of under 4 and a market cap of over $12 billion, predicted to reach $15.75 billion in revenues by 2023. The company recently acquired Oyster Point Pharma and Famy Life Sciences, expanding its exposure to the eye care market, and has a strong free cash flow (FCF) for further acquisitions. Despite a significant debt burden, Viatris has managed to reduce its long-term debt by over 25% through strategic divestitures and strong FCF generation.

title: Better High-Yield Dividend Stock: Altria or Viatris?
text: Tobacco giant Altria and generic drug specialist Viatris sport enormous dividend yields right now. In this head-to-head comparison, Viatris stands out as the better overall buy.

title: 3 Reasons to Buy Viatris Stock, and 1 Reason to Sell
text: Viatris is making good progress on its strategic plan to cut its debt. It's also going to have more money to give back to investors relatively soon.

title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Reminds Shareholders with Losses on their Investment in Viatris, Inc. of Class Action Lawsuit and Upcoming Deadline - VTRS
text: NEW YORK , July 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Pomerantz LLP announces that a class action lawsuit has been filed against Viatris, Inc. ("Viatris" or the "Company") (NASDAQ: VTRS), and certain officers. The class action, filed in the United States District Court for the Western District of Pennsylvania and docketed under 23-cv-01098, is on behalf of a class consisting of all persons and entities other than Defendants that purchased or otherwise acquired Viatris common stock between March 1, 2021 and February 25, 2022, inclusive (the "Class Period"), seeking remedies under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 (the "Exchange Act").
